message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via mission (#1134)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-1184-provide-manifests-so-rollout-dashboard-can-be-accessed-via-in",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via Ingress",
+    "description": "Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via Ingress. Requested by 23+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-rollouts deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nhelm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nIt would be very helpful if the GUI Dashboard was served by the operator itself, so that we could setup a stable URL for people to use to see the current rollout status."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via…",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nError: unknown command \"dashboard\" for \"kubectl-argo-rollouts\"\nRun 'kubectl-argo-rollouts --help' for usage.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/pull/1240",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Error: unknown command \"dashboard\" for \"kubectl-argo-rollouts\"\nRun 'kubectl-argo-rollouts --help' for usage.",
+        "apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1\nkind: Kustomization\n\nresources:\n- rbac.yaml\n- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-deployment.yaml\n- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-service.yaml\n- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-serviceaccount.yaml",
+        "---\napiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1\nkind: Role\nmetadata:\n  labels:\n    app.kubernetes.io/component: argo-rollouts-dashboard\n    app.kubernetes.io/name: argo-rollouts-dashboard\n    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argo-rollouts\n  name: argo-rollouts-dashboard\nrules:\n- apiGroups:\n  - argoproj.io\n  resources:\n  - rollouts\n  - rollouts/status\n  - rollouts/finalizers\n  verbs:\n  - get\n  - list\n  - watch\n  - update\n  - patch\n- apiGroups:\n  - argoproj.io\n  resources:\n  - analysisruns\n  - analysisruns/finalizers\n  - experiments\n  - experiments/finalizers\n  verbs:\n  - create\n  - get\n  - list\n  - watch\n- apiGroups:\n  - argoproj.io\n  resources:\n  - analysistemplates\n  - clusteranalysistemplates\n  verbs:\n  - get\n  - list\n  - watch\n- apiGroups:\n  - apps\n  resources:\n  - replicasets\n  verbs:\n  - get\n "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-rollouts",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-rollouts"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/1184",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/pull/1240"
+    },
+    "reactions": 23,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:23:42.163Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
